audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L344-348 computes `availableAssetUsdValue = eligibleAssets[i].amount * freshPrice / 10^decimals` and reverts with `AmountBelowMinAuctionSize` if below `assetParams.minAuctionSizeUsd`; this is the sole path to `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` (L353), confirmed by exhaustive grep. Price is freshly fetched at `performUpkeep` time (L342, `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)`), so even a price drop between `checkUpkeep` and `performUpkeep` is correctly caught and reverts.
